publishedAbstract: - How to export/import PGs from OSD disk?- How to import PGs to OSD daemon to recover `Incomplete` PGs? **CAUTION: These steps typically involve the Engineering team via bug case/Jira and have provided approval to accomplish the process.**
publishedTitle: How to Export/Import Placement Group (PG) Data and/or Examine the State of an Object Storage Daemon (OSD) using the Ceph ObjectStore Tool in OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF) v4.x
